title: Trump administration: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
summary_full: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.
summary_public: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran deal signing likely in coming days
